specifications: Efficiency 1 The efficiency of the element is shown using the Micron (µ) and Beta (β) ratings. The micron rating indicates the size of the particle being filtered and the beta rating the efficiency
calculated as 1/β. E.g. a rating of β200 will be 99.5% efficient whereas β1000 would be 99.9%.: 5µ @ β200

variants.title: Filtrec U122G06/ESD Suction Filter | Replaces the Eppensteiner 169020RH3XLE000P

variants.title: MicroFit® UltraGen III MFHLP30220 Pressure Filter | Replaces the Eppensteiner 16.9020RH3XLE000P
variants.description: The MICROFIT® UltraGen III MFHLP30220 is the MICROFIT® approved replacement to the Eppensteiner 16.9020RH3XLE000P. Engineered and manufactured in Great Britain the MFHLP30220 is designed to meet or exceed the quality and performance of OEM quality standards, ensuring superior filtration performance and the longest possible filter life. Building on over 50 years of filtration expertise, the UltraGen III series is the third generation of MICROFIT® filter media, delivering exceptional efficiency and reliability. FilterFinder is an approved distributor of MICROFIT® filters. With expert product knowledge, dedicated support, and a large stock availability, FilterFinder ensures you receive the parts you need when you need them, every time.
specifications: Efficiency 1 The efficiency of the element is shown using the Micron (µ) and Beta (β) ratings. The micron rating indicates the size of the particle being filtered and the beta rating the efficiency
calculated as 1/β. E.g. a rating of β200 will be 99.5% efficient whereas β1000 would be 99.9%.: 3µ @ β200
